results.title: Team India bowlers wreak havoc; Afghanistan reach 113 runs at stumps on Day 2
results.description: Team India`s Manav Suthar concluded Day 2 with the figures of three wickets for 21 runs in 15.5 overs. Prasidh Krishna has also claimed two wickets

results.title: England's Bazball reset begins with 115-run win over New Zealand early on Day 4 at Lord's
results.description: England has wrapped up a 115-run victory over New Zealand before lunch on Day 4 of the first cricket test at Lord’s. It marks a positive start to England's “Bazball” reset after the Ashes humiliation Down Under. New Zealand resumed...

results.title: England's Bazball reset begins with 115-run win over New Zealand early on Day 4 at Lord's
results.description: LONDON (AP) — England wrapped up a 115-run victory over New Zealand before lunch on Day 4 of the first cricket test at Lord’s on Sunday, marking a positive start to its “Bazball” reset after the Ashes humiliation Down Under.
